case_title: MARK LOCKE, D.C. VS. VIRGINIA PAPPAS et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2008 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE:$0.00) SERVED JUL-29-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SEPAHI, SAGE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $0.00 SERVED AUG-12-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PAPPAS, VIRGINIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARK LOCKE, D.C. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PAPPAS, VIRGINIA SEPAHI, SAGE THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF REACHED AN ACCORD AND SATISFACTION WITH DEFENDANT VIRGINIA PAPPAS THROUGH NEGOTIATIONS WITH HER ATTORNEY SAGE SEPAHI. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MARK LOCKE, D.C. AS TO DEFENDANT PAPPAS, VIRGINIA SEPAHI, SAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
